PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?person ?personLabel ?position ?positionLabel ?startTime WHERE {
  ?position wdt:P361 wd:Q639738 .
  ?person p:P39 ?positionStatement .
  ?positionStatement ps:P39 ?position .
  ?positionStatement pq:P580 ?startTime .
  ?person wdt:P21 wd:Q6581097 .
  FILTER(?startTime >= "1994-01-01" ^^ xsd:date)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?person rdfs:label ?personLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?personLabel) = "en")
    .
  }
  OPTIONAL {
    ?position rdfs:label ?positionLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?positionLabel) = "en")
    .
  }
}
ORDER BY ?startTime
